mapper.select: SELECT id, slot_date, time_slot, guide_language, guide_staff_id, guide_name, slot_status, created_at, updated_at FROM admin_slots WHERE slot_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY slot_date ASC, time_slot ASC, guide_language ASC

SELECT id, slot_date, time_slot, guide_language, guide_staff_id, guide_name, slot_status, created_at, updated_at FROM admin_slots WHERE slot_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND guide_language = #{guideLanguage} ORDER BY slot_date ASC, time_slot ASC
SELECT id, slot_date, time_slot, guide_language, guide_staff_id, guide_name, slot_status, created_at, updated_at FROM admin_slots WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, slot_date, time_slot, guide_language, guide_staff_id, guide_name, slot_status, created_at, updated_at FROM admin_slots WHERE slot_date = #{slotDate} AND time_slot = #{timeSlot} AND guide_language = #{guideLanguage} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_slots ( slot_date, time_slot, guide_language, guide_staff_id, guide_name, slot_status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{slotDate}, #{timeSlot}, #{guideLanguage}, #{guideStaffId}, #{guideName}, #{slotStatus}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_slots SET slot_date = #{slotDate}, time_slot = #{timeSlot}, guide_language = #{guideLanguage}, guide_staff_id = #{guideStaffId}, guide_name = #{guideName}, slot_status = #{slotStatus}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
